description_long: This is a compact, round stool with a light-colored, flat seat and three slender, evenly spaced legs. The seat appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material, giving it a natural, warm tone. The legs are straight, metallic, and have a silvery finish, providing a modern and utilitarian look. The stool is minimalistic, with no visible backrest, footrest, or decorative elements. Its small size and simple construction make it suitable for urban environments such as public waiting areas, parks, or bus stops. The overall design emphasizes functionality and ease of movement.
description: A small, round stool with a light wood seat and three straight metallic legs, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat and all three metallic legs evenly spaced.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the circular seat and the slender profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view with the seat and legs visible, similar to the front but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite direction, again showing the seat and the slim legs.
